heading: Factors Impacting Performance
body:
This section outlines several factors that impact performance for
MongoDB Vector Search and how we configured our benchmark to test them.

- [Quantization](avs-benchmark-quantization)

- [Dimensionality](avs-benchmark-dimensionality)

- [Filtering](avs-benchmark-filtering)

- [Search Node Configuration](avs-benchmark-search-node-config)

- [binData vector compression](avs-benchmark-bindata-compression)

- [Concurrency](avs-benchmark-concurrency)

- [Sharding](avs-benchmark-sharding)
